天才厨师穿越到了一六旬老头身上并激活系统。
只要依靠厨艺治愈那些受伤的灵魂便能获得超凡奖励。
可系统第一道任务，居然让他治愈厌食症患者！

色泽鲜艳的西红柿炒蛋、汤汁浓郁的土豆炖牛肉、肉汁横流的千层牛肉馅儿饼。
以上不是食谱上的精美画卷，而是出自这老头的作品。
前世的顶级厨艺，配合系统的神级食材，一场美食盛宴已经展开。
......
呼叫呼叫，医院北门未发现爷爷踪迹，欧威儿。
呼叫呼叫，医院南门也没有发现异常，欧威儿。
呼叫！呼叫！在东门，爷爷来了，爷爷骑着三轮车带着美食走来了！

医院的厌食症患者，吃了我的饭，从此顿顿炫两大碗。
学校的厌学少年，吃了我的饭，剪去长发摘掉耳钉，奋发图强考入名校。
CBD的白领上班族，吃了我的饭，职场关系融洽平步青云。

这就是我，一个普通摆摊卖饭老头儿，却经常被误会是明星签售会现场的摆摊生活。
这碗爷爷牌盖浇饭，60年的厨艺，你顶得住么。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o850089356db7bd426aae71b20ccacde9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"孙艺欣","author_id":"","book_id":"7322401129013201982","book_name":"爷爷随机摆摊，用美食治愈全世界","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4569人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7322730743845634622","read_count":"4569","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1138682"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"516","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,美食,天才,无女主,无后宫,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f391b891f9aa14b10ee2c59c12d89ec8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779365223&x-signature=iRPbzaD5bTVdk2TJ%2FdYC5alMB04%3D","tomato_book 可系统第一道任务，居然让他治愈厌食症患者！
